'''Wuja Wojaine''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Pydyrian]] who [[Senator/Legends|represented]] the [[Mortex sector/Legends|Almanian sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], Wojaine, a fradulent being, allowed a [[Thalassian slavers/Legends|Thalassian slaver organization]]—illegal in the Republic—to operate in the Almarian [[Sector/Legends|sector]] while the senator received kickbacks from the Thalassians.

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], it was discovered—along with fellow Senators [[Tikkes/Legends|Tikkes]], [[Bufus Ritsomas]], and [[Danry Ledwellow/Legends|Danry Ledwellow]]— that Wojaine was collaborating with the [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]], resulting in all four senators being arrested on corruption charges, as well as having their positions censured. It was later discovered Wojaine had joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], a separatist movement that had broken away from the Republic.
